details: The scheme "Pradhan Mantri Matasya Sampada Yojana: Cycle with Ice Boxes" by the Ministry Of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry & Dairying, Government of India, aims to provide central assistance for the cost of cycles with ice boxes to beneficiaries involved in fisheries activities. Through this scheme, central assistance for Cycle with Ice Box costs is provided for the initial crop only in the purchase of newly purchased cycles with ice boxes.
benefits: The scheme provides a subsidy for the cycle with ice boxes for fisheries activities.
The project cost is ₹0.10/- lakh per unit.
The subsidy will be limited to 40% of the project cost for beneficiaries falling under the General Category.
The subsidy will be limited to 60% of the project cost for beneficiaries who are Scheduled Caste (SC) or Women.
The Government of India and the Government of Haryana shall not be responsible for any losses incurred on procurement, operation, maintenance, and management of the fish transport facilities.
eligibility: Beneficiary must have Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP).
Beneficiaries should ensure that fish transport facilities are maintained in operational condition.
Beneficiaries shall be provided central assistance for Cycle with Ice box the initial crop only in the purchase of newly purchased Cycle with Ice Box
Central assistance for Cycle with Ice Box cost shall be released only for the fisheries activity.
Govt. of India and Govt. of Haryana shall not be responsible for any losses incurred on procurement, operation, maintenance and management of the fish transport facilities.

online: For registration, click on “New User/Register Here” and fill in all the mandatory details, i.e. Name, Email ID, Mobile Number & password. Click on ‘Submit’.
Verify the OTP received in the provided Email and Mobile Number. Alternatively, click on the Verification Link to activate the profile.
Login to Apply for the Scheme:
The “Sign in here” option is available on the right side of the screen. Fill in the required credentials and click on the ‘Login’ button.
In the opened window, click on “Scheme/Services list”, and a list of schemes will appear on the screen.
Now, select the scheme and click on “Apply for Service/Scheme”.
Fill in all the details in the online application form and click on "Submit".
Type SARAL and send to 9954699899 to track your application.
Type SARAL<space><Application ID/Ticket No.> and send to 9954699899 to track your application/ticket.

documents_required: Agreement Deed between Vendor and Fisheries Department.
Date of Birth Certificate (Voting Card/Birth Certificate/Aadhaar Card/Matriculation Certificate).
Caste Certificate from First Class Magistrate (Tehsildar).
Photographs of Beneficiary with Cycle with Ice-Box.
Detail of Bank Account and PAN Card.
Detailed Project Report (DPR)/Self Contained Proposal (SCP) as per Pradhan Mantri Matasya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY) guidelines.

faqs.question: What is the main objective of this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme aims to provide central assistance for Cycle with Ice Box costs for the initial crop only in the purchase of newly purchased Cycle with Ice Box.

faqs.question: Who are the intended beneficiaries of this scheme?
faqs.answer: Beneficiaries involved in fisheries activities are the intended recipients.

faqs.question: What is the financial assistance provided under this scheme?
faqs.answer: The project cost is ₹0.10 lakh per unit.

faqs.question: What percentage of subsidy can a General Category beneficiary expect?
faqs.answer: General Category beneficiaries are eligible for a subsidy limited to 40% of the project cost.

faqs.question: What percentage of subsidy is available for SC/Women beneficiaries?
faqs.answer: SC/Women beneficiaries are eligible for a subsidy limited to 60% of the project cost.

faqs.question: Will the central assistance cover the cost of multiple crops?
faqs.answer: No, central assistance for Cycle with Ice Box costs is provided for the initial crop only.

faqs.question: What documents are required to apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Required documents include an Agreement deed between vendor and Fisheries Department, Date of Birth Certificate, Voting Card/Birth Certificate/Aadhar Card/Matriculation Certificate, Caste Certificate, Training Certificate, Bills/Receipts/Vouchers, Photographs of beneficiary with Cycle with Ice-Box, Detail of Bank Account and Pan Card, and Detailed Project Report (DPR)/Self Contained Proposal (SCP) as per PMMSY guidelines.

faqs.question: Is a training certificate necessary for the application?
faqs.answer: Yes, a Training Certificate of Vendor/beneficiary is required.

faqs.question: Do I need to submit photographs with the application?
faqs.answer: Yes, photographs of the beneficiary with the Cycle with Ice-Box are required.

faqs.question: What financial details are required in the application?
faqs.answer: Details of your Bank Account and PAN Card are required

faqs.question: Is there a specific report or proposal required for the application?
faqs.answer: Yes, the beneficiary will submit a Detailed Project Report (DPR)/Self-Contained Proposal (SCP) as per PMMSY guidelines.

faqs.question: What specific condition must be maintained for the fish transport facilities?
faqs.answer: Beneficiaries should ensure that fish transport facilities are maintained in operational condition.

faqs.question: Does the scheme cover procurement, operation, maintenance, and management costs for the fish transport facilities?
faqs.answer: No, the Government of India and the Government of Haryana are not responsible for losses incurred on these aspects.
